description: Execute the full B-state primitive-taxonomy migration (M1-M6) as one branch/one PR: collapse {skills, agents, hooks, rules, identity} into .mifune/{skills,agents,hooks} + a small always-on context/ identity core. Eval suite green at every step.

userStories.title: M1: Agents to .mifune/agents
userStories.description: As a provider-portable harness, I want sub-agent definitions to live in .mifune/agents (canonical) with a .claude/agents back-symlink so all 4 providers + the skills registry address them as a unit, exactly as skills do.
acceptanceCriteria: git mv moves all of .claude/agents/*.md into .mifune/agents/
.claude/agents is a symlink -> ../.mifune/agents (so the ~40 existing .claude/agents refs still resolve)
.codex/agents -> ../.claude/agents still resolves to the moved files
.mifune/README.md lists agents/ as a portable primitive
bash .mifune/skills/eval/run.sh shows zero REGRESSION rows
CHANGELOG [Unreleased] records the agents move

userStories.title: M5: Hooks to .mifune/hooks
userStories.description: As a portable harness, I want enforcement hooks in .mifune/hooks (canonical) with a .claude/hooks back-symlink so settings.json hook paths keep resolving while hooks become a portable primitive.
acceptanceCriteria: git mv moves all of .claude/hooks/* into .mifune/hooks/
.claude/hooks is a symlink -> ../.mifune/hooks
settings.json / settings.local.json hook command paths still resolve through the symlink
.mifune/README.md lists hooks/ as a portable primitive
The CI hooks-path probe (harness-ci-hooks-paths) stays green
bash .mifune/skills/eval/run.sh shows zero REGRESSION rows
CHANGELOG [Unreleased] records the hooks move

userStories.title: M6: Skill-private scripts to skill dirs
userStories.description: As a self-contained skill, I want my single-owner script bundled in my skill dir (the eval/run.sh precedent) while shared scripts stay at root.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/autopilot-caps.sh moved to .mifune/skills/autopilot/autopilot-caps.sh
scripts/prompt-miner-caps.sh moved to .mifune/skills/prompt-miner/prompt-miner-caps.sh
crons/autopilot.md preflight: path and body refs repointed to the new path
crons/prompt-miner.md preflight: path and body refs repointed to the new path
crons/README.md references repointed
locked-append.sh, ralph.sh, cron-runtime.ts, ablate.sh, sandbox-healthcheck.sh remain at scripts/
Any probe referencing the moved script paths is repointed and green
bash .mifune/skills/eval/run.sh shows zero REGRESSION rows
CHANGELOG [Unreleased] records the script moves

userStories.title: M2: .oh/ config surface
userStories.description: As the oh CLI / installer, I want a .oh/ namespace for deploy/install/pack config, rescoping the dead .openharness/ — without breaking runtime paths.
acceptanceCriteria: .oh/README.md exists documenting the namespace + its external consumer (the oh CLI / oh harness add / container build), per the directory-README convention
The stale .openharness reference in install/banner.sh is rescoped to .oh/ (or corrected)

Any installer/lifecycle config relocated under .oh/ has every Makefile/CI/devcontainer/cross-script reference updated; if a relocation cannot keep CI+eval green it is left at root with a recorded rationale
bash .mifune/skills/eval/run.sh shows zero REGRESSION rows
CHANGELOG [Unreleased] records the .oh/ surface

userStories.title: M3: Rules to skills (easy first)
userStories.description: As a provider-portable norm, I want task-triggered rules to become skills (loaded on demand) following the git.md pointer template, so behavioral norms work across Codex/Pi/Hermes not just Claude.
acceptanceCriteria: context/rules/remote-installers.md deleted after confirming zero inbound refs (norm folded into a skill reference if any consumer exists)
.mifune/skills/advisor/SKILL.md created from advisor-model.md content; recursive-delegation.md content placed at .mifune/skills/advisor/references/recursive-delegation.md
context/rules/advisor-model.md and recursive-delegation.md left as thin pointers to /advisor
evals/probes/advisor-monitored-loop.sh repointed to the /advisor skill location and green
wiki.md schema moved to .mifune/skills/wiki-ingest/references/schema.md with a thin pointer left at context/rules/wiki.md; wiki probes green
sandbox-processes.md content moved to a skill references/ doc with a thin pointer left behind
directory-readme.md remains a context/ doc
bash .mifune/skills/eval/run.sh shows zero REGRESSION rows
CHANGELOG [Unreleased] records the rules-to-skills moves

userStories.title: M4: Always-on collapse (identity core)
userStories.description: As the harness, I want the always-on rules tier collapsed: memory protocol into /retro + a one-line AGENTS.md pointer, context/rules/ removed, session-start loader rewritten.
acceptanceCriteria: memory.md content moved to .mifune/skills/retro/references/memory-protocol.md
AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md carries a one-line always-on pointer keeping the Memory Improvement Protocol firing after every skill (-> /retro)
evals/probes/memory-gitignore-claim.sh and evals/probes/git-skill.sh repointed as needed and green
The context/rules/ tier is removed (pointer files deleted) and the .claude/rules -> ../context/rules symlink removed
AGENTS.md Session start loader + the rules-autoload sentence rewritten to load identity + name canonical skills instead of context/rules/*
directory-readme.md convention remains reachable (relocated to a context/ doc or skill reference)
docs/roadmap.md Status column ticked through M6
bash .mifune/skills/eval/run.sh shows zero REGRESSION rows
CHANGELOG [Unreleased] records the always-on collapse
